title: 32% Retention but Stuck at ₹30 Cr? How to Use AI to Hit a ₹500 Cr Goal | Ft. The Little Farm Co.

key_insights: Use AI to optimize business growth and hit a ₹500 Cr goal
Focus on building strong relationships with mentors and partners for guidance and support
Prioritize accurate forecasting and inventory management to improve supply chain efficiency
market_gaps: The organized sector in the pickle market is still highly unorganized, with a huge scope for growth
There are regional brands that have traditionally been successful in general trade across India
tools_mentioned: AI tools for optimizing business growth and forecasting
Spreadsheets for order planning and forecasting (although Aditya mentions this is not efficient)
strategies: The 0 to 1 journey framework for building small businesses
Focusing on a specific product line or category, rather than trying to be everything
quotable_moments: Retail is very much like that. And I'll say something which you know which many people would have told you is that the quick commerce is the new retail.
intelligence.target_audience: Founders and entrepreneurs in the D2C space, particularly those looking to scale their businesses
